title: The Talking T. Rex
desc: A talking robot T. Rex hides a rare silver dollar — but someone wants that prize for themselves! 🦖

q.en: What kind of dinosaur is in the story's title?
q.zh: 书名里说的是哪种恐龙？

options.en: A Velociraptor according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 伶盗龙（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The 'T. Rex' in the title is a Tyrannosaurus Rex, the famous big meat-eating dinosaur.
explain.zh: 书名里的“T. Rex”是霸王龙（Tyrannosaurus Rex），就是那种著名的大型肉食恐龙。

q.en: What is special about the T. Rex in the story?
q.zh: 故事里的霸王龙有什么特别之处？

options.en: It is a talking, moving robot dinosaur
options.zh: 它是一只会说话、会动的机器恐龙

options.en: It is a real living dinosaur according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 它是一只在世的真恐龙（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: It is a drawing on paper

explain.en: The T. Rex is an animatronic robot that can move and 'talk' to greet visitors.
explain.zh: 这只霸王龙是一具电子动画机器人，会动、会“说话”来迎接游客。

q.en: Where is the T. Rex shown?

options.en: In Dink's backyard according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 在丁克家的后院（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: At a museum or dinosaur exhibit
options.zh: 在博物馆或恐龙展览上

explain.en: The talking T. Rex is a new attraction at a museum or dinosaur exhibit the kids visit.
explain.zh: 会说话的霸王龙是孩子们参观的博物馆或恐龙展览里的新展品。

q.en: What valuable thing is hidden inside the T. Rex?
q.zh: 什么东西被藏在霸王龙体内？

options.en: A diamond necklace according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一条钻石项链（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: A collector has hidden a valuable rare silver dollar inside the T. Rex as part of a contest.
explain.zh: 一位收藏家把一枚珍贵的罕见银元藏在霸王龙体内，作为比赛的一部分。

q.en: Why is the coin hidden inside the T. Rex?
q.zh: 为什么要把硬币藏在霸王龙体内？

options.en: Because it was lost by accident according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 因为不小心弄丢了（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: As a gift for the mayor
As a contest prize for whoever finds it
options.zh: 作为谁找到就归谁的比赛奖品

explain.en: The coin is a contest prize — whoever finds it inside the T. Rex gets to keep the rare dollar.
explain.zh: 这枚硬币是比赛奖品——谁在霸王龙体内找到它，这枚罕见的银元就归谁。

q.en: What problem happens in the story?
q.zh: 故事里发生了什么麻烦事？

options.en: The coin disappears and the T. Rex is tampered with
options.zh: 硬币不见了，霸王龙还被人动了手脚

options.en: The T. Rex comes alive according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 霸王龙活了过来（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The rare coin goes missing and the T. Rex is messed with, so the friends must find out why.
explain.zh: 那枚罕见的硬币不见了，霸王龙还被人动了手脚，小伙伴们必须查清原因。

q.zh: 是谁在调查硬币失踪案？

explain.en: As always in the series, the three friends become detectives to solve the case.
explain.zh: 和这个系列里一样，三个好朋友化身小侦探来破案。

q.en: What do the kids use to solve the case?

options.en: A computer game according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一个电脑游戏（按书中另一种说法）
他们留意到的线索和团队合作

explain.en: They watch carefully, gather clues, and work together — just like real detectives.
explain.zh: 他们仔细观察、搜集线索并齐心协力——就像真正的侦探一样。

q.zh: 这个谜团最后是怎么解开的？

options.en: The coin is found and the culprit is caught
options.zh: 硬币被找到，肇事者也被抓住了

options.en: The T. Rex is thrown away according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 霸王龙被扔掉了（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: The friends recover the rare silver dollar and figure out who tried to steal it.
explain.zh: 小伙伴们找回了那枚罕见的银元，并查出了想偷它的人。

q.en: What kind of book is 'The Talking T. Rex'?
q.zh: 《会说话的霸王龙》是一本什么样的书？

options.en: An A to Z Mystery the friends solve
options.zh: 一本三个好朋友破案的A to Z Mysteries

options.en: A dinosaur science textbook according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一本科普教材（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: It is one of the A to Z Mysteries, where Dink, Josh, and Ruth Rose solve a puzzling crime.
explain.zh: 它是A to Z Mysteries系列之一，丁克、乔希和露丝·罗丝一起破解一桩离奇案件。
